candidates.name: Aisha Khan
candidates.summary: AI engineer with six years of production ML experience, focused on LLM applications and inference at scale.

experience.title: Senior ML Engineer
experience.description: Lead engineer on a RAG product serving 4M queries/month. Built the inference orchestration layer in Python + Ray; reduced p95 latency from 2.4s to 680ms. Owns model versioning and rollback via MLflow.

experience.title: ML Engineer
experience.description: Shipped fine-tuned classification models for legal-tech client. Built dataset curation pipelines on AWS Sagemaker.

candidates.resumeText: Aisha Khan — Senior ML Engineer with 6 years building production AI systems. Currently at Helio AI leading the RAG inference layer (4M queries/month, p95 sub-700ms). Strong Python + PyTorch fundamentals. Deep familiarity with MLOps tooling: MLflow for model registry, Kubeflow for batch jobs, ArgoCD for deploys. Two open-source contributions to the Ray Serve project. B.E. CS from BITS Pilani (2019).

candidates.name: Marcus Chen
candidates.summary: Full-stack engineer with 8 years across backend systems and applied ML. Strong production instincts, less depth in research-grade ML.

experience.title: Staff Engineer
experience.description: Tech lead on data platform team. Built feature store powering recommendation models; integrated TensorFlow Serving for online inference.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
experience.description: Owned billing service in Go. Migrated legacy monolith to microservices; led on-call rotation.

candidates.resumeText: Marcus Chen — 8 years engineering, 4 of those touching ML systems in production. Currently Staff Engineer at Skyfire owning the data platform. Built a feature store from scratch; integrated TF Serving for online inference at 2K req/sec. Earlier at Outcrop on backend infrastructure (Go, PostgreSQL, Kafka). UC Berkeley EECS, 2017. Strong production instincts; would describe ML depth as applied not research.

candidates.name: Priya Sharma
candidates.summary: Product designer with 5 years across consumer fintech and SaaS. Code-aware — comfortable in HTML/CSS and reads React.

experience.title: Senior Product Designer
experience.description: Lead designer on B2B onboarding flows. Owns the design system (40+ components in Figma). Runs weekly usability tests.

experience.title: Product Designer
experience.description: Designed mobile-first investing flows. Shipped the portfolio detail screen used by 200K users.

candidates.resumeText: Priya Sharma — Senior Product Designer, 5 years. Currently at Plumb leading design on B2B onboarding. Built and maintains a 40+ component design system in Figma. Strong user-research practice (weekly usability testing). Code-aware: writes basic HTML/CSS, reads Tailwind, has shipped Framer prototypes that engineers use directly. NID Ahmedabad, B.Des. Communication Design (2020).

candidates.name: Daniel Okafor
candidates.summary: Backend engineer with 4 years in Python and FastAPI. Some applied ML, mostly classification. Strong on data pipelines.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
experience.description: Built fraud-detection pipeline using scikit-learn classifiers; processes 50K transactions/day. Owns the data warehouse ETL in Airflow.

candidates.resumeText: Daniel Okafor — Backend Engineer, 4 years, Lagos-based, remote-friendly. Currently at a fintech in Lagos building fraud-detection ML pipelines (scikit-learn) processing 50K transactions/day. Strong Python + FastAPI + PostgreSQL fundamentals; less experience with deep learning frameworks (no PyTorch in production). University of Lagos, B.Sc. CS (2021).

candidates.name: Lakshmi Reddy
candidates.summary: Junior product designer with 2 years of agency experience across early-stage SaaS clients.

experience.title: Product Designer
experience.description: Designs for early-stage SaaS clients. Owns 3 active projects spanning landing pages, onboarding, and dashboard surfaces.

candidates.resumeText: Lakshmi Reddy — Product Designer, 2 years. Currently at Studio Manava, a small Chennai design agency, working on early-stage SaaS clients. Comfortable in Figma and basic user research. No design-system experience yet. Srishti Institute, B.Des. UX Design (2023).

candidates.name: James Patel
candidates.summary: Performance marketing lead with 7 years, mostly DTC e-commerce. Strong with paid social + paid search at scale.

experience.title: Performance Marketing Lead
experience.description: Owns ~$2M/quarter paid spend across Meta + Google. Lifted ROAS from 2.1 to 3.4 via creative iteration and audience structure rework.

experience.title: Senior Performance Marketer
experience.description: Managed paid acquisition for 12+ DTC clients. Strong client-facing communication; led monthly business reviews.

candidates.resumeText: James Patel — Performance Marketing Lead, 7 years. Currently at Northwell DTC managing $2M/quarter paid spend (Meta, Google, TikTok). Lifted ROAS from 2.1 to 3.4 over 18 months through creative testing and audience-tier rework. Earlier at Beam Agency for 4 years across 12+ DTC clients. Less LinkedIn Ads exposure than the other platforms. University of Manchester, BA Economics (2017).

candidates.name: Saanvi Reddy

experience.title: Marketing Manager

experience.title: Performance Marketing Associate
experience.description: Ran Meta + Google campaigns for 5 e-commerce brands. Learned A/B testing discipline.

candidates.resumeText: Saanvi Reddy — Marketing Manager, 4 years. Currently at Elsewhere Studio (B2B SaaS) owning paid acquisition + email lifecycle; generated 300+ qualified leads last quarter. Earlier 1.5 years at Curio Media on e-comm brands. Comfortable with GA4 basics, less depth in Looker Studio. No formal LinkedIn Ads experience. MBA Marketing, Symbiosis (2021).

candidates.name: Kabir Hassan
candidates.summary: Performance marketer with 5 years in B2B SaaS lead gen. Deep with LinkedIn Ads and Google Ads.

experience.title: Senior Performance Marketer

experience.title: Performance Specialist

candidates.resumeText: Kabir Hassan — Senior Performance Marketer, 5 years in B2B SaaS. Currently at Roundnet driving cost-per-MQL from $94 to $52 over 9 months. Deep LinkedIn Ads + Google Ads expertise; comfortable in HubSpot and Salesforce. Has built 4 different lead-scoring models. IIM Bangalore MBA (2020). Available immediately.

candidates.name: Yara Costa
candidates.summary: Product designer with 4 years in fintech and edtech. Strong systems thinking; runs research informally.

experience.title: Product Designer

experience.title: Junior Product Designer

candidates.resumeText: Yara Costa — Product Designer, 4 years across fintech and edtech. Currently sole designer at Mosaic Edu (30-person edtech) — built the design system from scratch, runs monthly research with teachers. Earlier 2 years at Banco Largo on transactional flows. Strong with Figma variables and Lottie. FAAP São Paulo, Bachelor of Design (2021). Working from São Paulo, comfortable with India hours.

candidates.name: Theo Andersson
candidates.summary: ML researcher-turned-engineer with 3 years professional experience. Strong on transformer internals; less production tooling.

experience.title: ML Engineer
experience.description: Member of the inference team for a coding-assistant product. Optimized CUDA kernels reducing inference cost by 30%. Co-authored one paper at NeurIPS '24 workshop.

experience.title: Research Engineer
experience.description: Worked on representation learning for protein structures. Published one workshop paper.

candidates.resumeText: Theo Andersson — ML Engineer, 3 years. Currently at Liquid Compute on the inference team for a coding-assistant product. Optimized CUDA kernels for 30% cost reduction. Co-author on one NeurIPS '24 workshop paper. Earlier research engineer at KTH on protein representation learning. Strong on transformer internals and CUDA; less depth in production MLOps tooling beyond what we used at Liquid (Argo, basic K8s). KTH M.Sc. ML (2022).

candidates.name: Jia Wen Liu
candidates.summary: Backend ops engineer with 2 years. Curious about ML; no production ML experience yet.

experience.title: Site Reliability Engineer
experience.description: On-call engineer for a fintech infrastructure team. Owns Terraform-based platform and a couple of internal Python services.

experience.title: Junior Backend Engineer
experience.description: First role out of school. Wrote Go services for transaction routing.

candidates.resumeText: Jia Wen Liu — SRE, 2 years. Currently at Stack Network running Terraform-managed platform and a few Python services. Background in operations and reliability; no professional ML experience yet but completed two ML courses on Coursera. Eager to transition into ML engineering. NUS B.Sc. CS (2023).

candidates.name: Riya Joshi

experience.title: Freelance Designer

candidates.name: Felix Müller

experience.title: Marketing Analyst
experience.description: Owns reporting and attribution for the marketing team. Built the GA4 + Looker Studio dashboard the org now relies on for weekly reviews.

Comfortable in SQL. Less hands-on with Meta or LinkedIn Ads — most of his exposure has been through reporting on someone else's campaigns. TU Berlin, M.Sc. Marketing Analytics (2023).

candidates.name: Amina Diallo

experience.title: Editor

candidates.resumeText: Amina Diallo — Senior Content Strategist, 6 years. Currently at Lattice Media leading editorial for 3 B2B SaaS clients. Strong on SEO content and long-form writing. Earlier 2.5 years editing at Africa Is a Country. Has run paid promotion of content via boosted posts but doesn't own a P&L for paid acquisition. Université Cheikh Anta Diop, M.A. Communications (2019).

candidates.name: Noah Levy

candidates.resumeText: Noah Levy — Staff Product Designer, 8 years. Currently founding designer at a Slack-adjacent collaboration startup; built the design system from zero (now 80+ components, used by 30+ engineers). Wrote and maintains a Figma → Tailwind token pipeline. Earlier 3 years at Vox Media on editorial CMS surfaces. Strong with HTML/CSS, Tailwind, and Framer prototypes. Cooper Union B.F.A. (2017). Brooklyn-based, 8h time zone overlap with Auroville is workable.
